import { step } from "@blokjs/core";
import CustomNode from "../nodes/custom";
import { ExprNode, LogNode, ThrowNode } from "@blokjs/helpers";


export function build() {
	step("expr", ExprNode, { expression: "ctx.request.body.value" });
	step("log", LogNode, { level: "info" });
	step("throw", ThrowNode, { message: "boom" });
	step("custom", CustomNode, {});
	// blok-migrate: hand-migrate (node resolution)
	step("dupe", "dupe", {});
	// blok-migrate: hand-migrate (node resolution)
	step("missing", "missing-node", {});
}
